login.title: Login to Vitazi.ai
login.subtitle: Securely continue your retinal health and care journey.

register.title: Register to Vitazi.ai
register.subtitle: Complete the sign up request form below:

completeForm.title: Complete The Form Below to Finish Setting Up Your Account.
completeForm.subtitle: Enter your details to securely complete your account setup.
completeForm.consent: I authorize Vitazi.ai Inc. to share my de-identified health information with third-party (such as research organizations) for purposes of medical research.

connectClinic.title: Scan QR Code To Connect With Your Clinic
connectClinic.subtitle: Scan the clinic QR code to securely connect your account and continue setup.

qrScanner.hint: Align QR code within the frame

notifications.reminderNote: {{days}} days away. A reminder will be sent again 1 day before your appointment.
notifications.arriveEarly: Hi, you have an upcoming retinal screening appointment. Please arrive 10 minutes early and bring your insurance card.
